name: @ondewo/survey-client-typescript
description: ONDEWO Survey (SURVEY) Client library for Typescript
author: ONDEWO GmbH <office@ondewo.com>

scripts.pretest: tsc auth/offlineTokenProvider.ts auth/offlineTokenProvider.spec.ts examples/ts-client.ts examples/ts-client.spec.ts examples/survey-list-app.ts --ignoreConfig --rootDir . --module commonjs --target es2020 --strict --lib es2020,dom --skipLibCheck --sourceMap --types node --typeRoots ./node_modules/@types --outDir .test-build
